title: codonorhiza azurea
intro: Codonorhiza azurea, also known as Azurea or Azure Flower, is a plant species belonging to the family Gentianaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Codonorhiza azurea include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, with herbal preparations often involving boiling the roots or leaves to create a tea or syrup for medicinal use.
